textByHashes.f6518053b53b9e2a5805ea9c6cada11ec283c99c: ... really no fuss at all! Anyway, has that potion done anything for you yet?
textByHashes.8336e5ff5b93a2af0782497da936a9e02f9cd507: Very good! Very good! A positive first step indeed! We'll give it a bit longer to make sure it properly kicks in, and then we can start on cleaning up that wound.
textByHashes.8d677706a93f97b647b897210e8ac22753677889: Oh look, a human! Is this the one you mentioned, Floopa?
textByHashes.3a04cdbcedfa6e6b9af10b32eb3137989c64c007: Come now, Floopa. You should be more welcoming to the human.
textByHashes.6531293aec399377ee53e7838748e99b2af43fcf: You can say that again! It looks like you've been in a fight with the Sharhai itself!
textByHashes.57f076b478adaeb71fa92a48aae46424a55b6000: Ah, but you must forgive me, human. Here I am admonishing Floopa for her manners while not showing any myself! I'm Raley, one of the elders here on the Great Conch.
textByHashes.818cf77d687679250c2eca89d127639362cfc193: You'll have to forgive me, but I'm a bit all over the place at the moment. We're still dealing with the aftermath of another blasted gryphon attack!
textByHashes.351a38a1f22ba1bf0efb6517e1ed8ed5ddfc07d4: A few cuts and scrapes, but nothing serious. It did manage to make quite the mess around town though. At some point I'll need to help some of the more senior elders with repairs, but one thing at a time.
textByHashes.a119a9ba12490a931ff8446ea14271c8cfd3ec17: I wouldn't say no to a bit of extra help, though Floopa is right, . Do not feel like you need to do any more.
textByHashes.2351fd00211b93d804a8697dba05a0af8177af0b: Most of the elders will handle their own repair work, so it's just the more senior ones who'll need your help. I've made a list of the work that needs to be done.
textByHashes.6153341e167f02454717ea253c1cc122285d560d: You'll need a mix of jatoba logs, sea shells and our very own scutes. You'll find some jatoba trees growing to the west of town and the shells are easy enough to find on the various beaches.
textByHashes.7e91d12981b415d8ed2c7b7b50af59260174b3d0: As for the scutes, they get shed quite regularly, so it shouldn't be too hard to find a few dotted around the island.
textByHashes.9cbeb1ad7417ef822f0525699a96edee0e3ad6ba: Just come back and let me know if you get stuck with anything. Now, Floopa, I think that potion will have fully done its work now, so let's get to work on that wound.
textByHashes.f7557d6f9eb56864a55add576ad44616b950cde0: Yes, it will probably sting a bit...
textByHashes.34e847bf3398346416ba1806d572c07cad485e5b: You might want to leave her to it for a bit. Tidying the wound isn't the most pleasant of experiences.
textByHashes.33d6a52637f824f012c959993d2bcbf3a18cc250: Welcome back, . How are those repairs going?
textByHashes.ebb5dcf14703f9438b51dbe4906c47ce847eb372: Don't forget, you'll need a mix of jatoba logs, sea shells and our very own scutes. You'll find some jatoba trees growing to the west of town and the shells are easy enough to find on the various beaches.
textByHashes.9f0dda2a50151e07b914db9692d8a6a64239081b: Wonderful! And, you'll be pleased to know that I was successful in properly tidying up Floopa's wound. I'll need her to stay here for a while to make sure it properly heals, but I expect a full recovery!
textByHashes.a8aba6d062b7e75deef51f22c5638af35aa9cf9a: Floopa, this is a highly traumatic experience you've gone through, and I won't lie to you, it will change your life forever. But Floopa, you are not, and never will be, useless.
textByHashes.c6e6cba1faf81ce98d1da7e1a4b3b06b4ec0a701: You should get some rest. We will sort you out with a place to stay here for as long as you need, and I will be on hand to help you however I can.
textByHashes.c43c2b8456224d7ab917c6412967ff3d53c76194: For Floopa? No. Rest is what she now needs. However, and please do say no if it's too much to ask, you might be able to help us out some more with that gryphon problem.
textByHashes.47f08acaf90e4f61c8b45607385d9bc4301a47f7: Unfortunately, while we were able to injure it, the gryphon managed to escape before we could finish it off. One that aggressive can't be allowed to return.
textByHashes.ac3aa290cc674a83fd2598bc7c49ec3ca4a0d358: Korel was planning to deal with it himself, but other matters have required his attention.
textByHashes.0894f93a79212658db10def2c134d9efe3a80729: Very good! You really are too kind! It seemed like the injury prevented the gryphon from flying, so you hopefully won't have much trouble picking up its trail. I suggest you start in the middle of town.
textByHashes.bd0a6abb45950bdd656079031991eae23b8c4987: Oh, , I hope you haven't taken offense! It's really nothing personal. It's just how we do things.
textByHashes.eb732e3e5435afc8a3d45863cd44b5f1801b5caa: It's not just limited to humans either. You might have noticed that there are no adult tortugans here on the Conch, just juveniles and elders.
textByHashes.05f2d554fa45a851524837a72c417b1896cf77dd: Yes, I suppose it is. We tortugans like our privacy, and we don't like being overly dependent on others. It is these preferences that have formed our way of life.
textByHashes.3099871706f1446789eb4d513da16ca9e8dfbd0c: Out in the wider world, living their lives. They return here from time to time, usually when it is time to mate.
textByHashes.9cbad655ec658a8cf2e5802c183728e02454f0d4: Yes, there can be a certain level of... pride, shall we say, amongst the younger adults. They have been known to see independence as a constant requirement.
textByHashes.897e20137951edddaaf69d1ac4c1b607c45f7fcc: It's rude to eavesdrop, Floopa! You should be resting!
textByHashes.3d82eceb79e2f5a263a4ba0ae61ee324b799d937: Anyway, as I was saying, it is a trait seen amongst many of the younger adults. They soon grow out of it. No one wants to be a burden of course, but we elders understand that there is no shame in asking for help.
textByHashes.a5dd8af9306be474c780d6538896e8883cf18021: Unfortunately so. They are the main predator we have to deal with here on the Conch, and it seems they have decided that we are quite the delicacy.
textByHashes.35e71f512f2f6bf47fdd66262f140d8aa71f8240: Thankfully, most of them keep to the quieter parts of the island, making them easier to handle. However, from time to time, one will grow bold enough to try and target the town.
textByHashes.6b2d579c80b6be497a577402062ff04b167fcb44: Ah, it is nothing to be sad about. We have grown used to it. Besides, while the gryphons may prey upon us, in many ways, we prey upon them as well.
textByHashes.ac13e6b23eac87b9c595f6a918b79b70c671bfeb: Killing them keeps their numbers under control, and their claws and feathers come in quite useful. In fact, all tortugans must obtain a gryphon claw as part of their Trial by Water.
textByHashes.acfb0101178309377b167d14417108ca240b0f72: It is a rite of passage that all juvenile tortugans must go through on their journey to adulthood. On rare occasions, members of other races have undergone the Trial themselves, becoming honourary tortugans.
textByHashes.4f6d2607dc9e6818e8aa8e94edc390928ee06120: Perhaps at some point you will be able to take on the trial yourself. You have already shown yourself to be both capable and trustworthy. However, that is a conversation for another day.
textByHashes.468a086b0a34d750cbd12ce1906b37605345b366: Welcome back, . Any luck with that gryphon?
textByHashes.a1a7cdb483646705da871f540d236beb84cf2d5a: You should hopefully be able to pick up its trail in the middle of town. Good luck!
textByHashes.3d7d0f6663e1cdd7749c3cc0acbce8f826896461: This doesn't make sense! They've never attacked the Pearl before!
textByHashes.2fe980b76fbe15da44b98cf3e5b9d9689511e7d6: You'll find the Pearl south east of the Conch. It shouldn't take you long to get there, but make sure you don't go underprepared! It sounds like this gryphon is one of the larger ones.
textByHashes.5cd6b0d4f355600770b235d9de2dd41480843efd: Hurry, ! You need to head to the Little Pearl!
textByHashes.3a43907dea18c73468d3192641d1ff191c8cc4ef: You're back, ! What news from the Pearl?
textByHashes.8adaca88b84b0c183b4adf6c7ebe7594b380b872: More than that! You need more rest as well. , we should give her the time she needs. Return to us later once she has rested.
textByHashes.9ee2bac96bbdccf5a09178f0546df56ca542f99f: In the meantime, may I suggest you take this opportunity to further explore our island. I'm sure you'll find it has a lot to offer.
textByHashes.f34be92e9989373d965f834d7593cdba642914f8: No, no, no! Thank you, ! We will talk again soon.
textByHashes.603dae46a7fd09b51605c2bdc555cfc3d27731e9: Welcome back, Player. Floopa still needs time to rest and to think upon the meaning of that ship. May I suggest you come back later?
